packai.screen.title: Pack AI Assistant
packai.screen.chat_empty: Start chatting — type a question or use a sidebar button.
packai.screen.jei_think_hint: Hover an item in JEI, or type mod:id
packai.screen.how_to_use: How do I use held item?
packai.model_picker.title: Choose model
packai.settings.title: Pack AI Settings
packai.settings.hint: Paste the full API key here (not the NeoForge string box)
packai.settings.tooltip.api_key: Cloud API key (OpenAI / OpenRouter / …). Shown masked; paste the full key here.
packai.settings.tooltip.save_key: Save API key only and refresh the model list.
packai.settings.tooltip.api_base: OpenAI-compatible API base URL. Click Save all after editing. e.g. https://api.openai.com/v1
packai.settings.tooltip.mode:
Auto: cloud if key present, else Ollama, else offline.
Cloud / Ollama: force that backend.
Offline: no LLM calls.
packai.settings.tooltip.model: Pick the model to use. Disabled in offline mode.
packai.settings.tooltip.refresh_models: Re-fetch models from the current backend.
packai.settings.tooltip.max_jei_chars: Max JEI recipe text sent to the LLM. Lower = fewer tokens / cost.
packai.settings.tooltip.history_turns: Recent chat messages included as LLM history. 0 = this question only.
packai.settings.tooltip.max_facts: Max local / quest / web fact lines packed into the prompt.
packai.settings.tooltip.sidebar: Put assistant shortcut buttons on the left or right.
packai.settings.tooltip.prefer_obtain: Coarse preference for how to obtain items. Custom Recipe categories order overrides this.
packai.settings.tooltip.recipe_cats: Toggle JEI recipe categories and drag to set priority (summaries and recipe cards).
packai.settings.tooltip.web_search: Enable/disable web search and optional Tavily or Serper keys (free Modrinth+Wiki when empty).
packai.settings.tooltip.save_all: Save API key and API Base URL.
packai.web_settings.title: Web search
packai.web_settings.serper_hint: Optional; used if Tavily is empty…
packai.web_settings.hint: With no keys, uses free Modrinth + Minecraft Wiki
packai.web_settings.tooltip.enable: When off, answers never search the web. When on, search may still run with local overrides; local wins on conflict.
packai.web_settings.tooltip.tavily: Paid search (preferred). Or env TAVILY_API_KEY / PACKAI_TAVILY_API_KEY.
packai.web_settings.tooltip.serper: Paid search (after Tavily). Or env SERPER_API_KEY / PACKAI_SERPER_API_KEY.
packai.web_settings.tooltip.save: Save Tavily / Serper keys to config.
packai.web_settings.tooltip.done: Back to settings. Toggle saves immediately; keys need Save keys.
packai.recipe_cats.title: JEI recipe categories
packai.recipe_cats.no_jei: JEI must be loaded to list categories
packai.recipe_cats.hint: Toggle to show; clear search, then drag to set priority (top first)
packai.recipe_cats.tooltip.search: Filter by title or UID. Drag is disabled while searching.
packai.recipe_cats.tooltip.reset: Clear custom order and hidden list; restore preferObtain heuristic.
packai.recipe_cats.tooltip.done: Return to settings. Changes are saved immediately.
packai.model_picker.tooltip.search: Filter the model list by keyword.
packai.model_picker.tooltip.refresh: Re-fetch models from the API / Ollama.
packai.model_picker.tooltip.done: Go back without changing the model.
packai.status.reply_ready_body: Reply ready — open the assistant or click a quest link below
packai.status.reply_ready_chat: [Pack AI] Reply ready. Open Pack AI to read the full answer.
packai.status.no_quest_mod: FTB Quests is not installed — cannot open quest book.
packai.status.open_heracles_manual: Please open the Heracles quest book item manually.
packai.status.bridge_down: Bridge unreachable at %s — start bridge/ first.
packai.tooltip.think.suffix: to think about this item with Pack AI
packai.status.think_no_item: Hover an item in JEI or inventory, then press Y
packai.status.think_busy: AI is busy — wait for the current reply
packai.ask.quest_next: According to the quest book, what should I do next for my current quest? I'm stuck.
packai.ask.held_next: Based on my held item and this modpack, what should I do next?
packai.ask.item_about: What is %s used for in this pack? Recipes and how to obtain?
packai.ask.item_about_id: What is %s (%s) used for in this pack? Recipes and how to obtain?
packai.reply.label.ai_only: AI model (no JEI / quest / local data cited)
packai.reply.label.acquire_offline: pack loot / fishing / trades / local scripts
packai.reply.note_pack_specific: [Note] This is pack-specific and may differ from generic wikis.
packai.reply.friendly_offline:
AI detail is unavailable (offline or no model configured).
Tip: check the quest book, or look up the held item in JEI/EMI.
packai.reply.shaped_recipe:
[How] Crafting table (shaped): %s
[Materials] %s
[Steps] 1. Open crafting table 2. Place pattern 3. Take %s
packai.reply.shapeless_recipe:
[How] Crafting table (shapeless): %s
[Materials] %s
[Steps] 1. Open crafting table 2. Add materials 3. Take %s
packai.reply.removed_recipe:
[How] The pack removed or blocked some vanilla/mod recipes
[Steps] Check the quest book, or JEI/EMI for remaining options
packai.reply.cloud_no_key: Cloud mode is on but no API key is set. Put llm.apiKey in config/packai-client.toml, or set PACKAI_API_KEY; or switch llm.mode to auto / ollama / offline.
packai.reply.ollama_down: Ollama mode is on but cannot reach Ollama (%s). Start Ollama and pull a model, or change llm.mode.
packai.reply.tip_offline_quest: Note: offline mode — quest book summary only (no LLM).
packai.reply.tip_quest_summary_no_ai: Note: AI did not reply; quest book summary above.
packai.reply.tip_offline_empty: Note: offline mode (no LLM). No quest content found; change llm.mode or install a quest mod.
packai.reply.tip_need_llm: Tip: set llm.mode and API key under Mods → Packai, or install and start Ollama.
packai.reply.quest_override_notice: [Note: skipped quest-book guide (you said the quest may be wrong)]
packai.reply.guide_header_rich: [Quest content] From the pack quest book:
packai.reply.guide_header: [Quest guide] Related quests found. Use the buttons below to open them:
packai.reply.guide_desc_fallback: Summary: open the quest book via the button below.
packai.reply.guide_more: More related quests may exist — search in the quest book.
packai.reply.guide_stuck: If you are stuck, follow the quest instructions first.
packai.reply.guide_conflict: [Warning] Quest text may be outdated; pack recipes below take priority:
packai.reply.script_removed: Script removed the original recipe (pack change)
packai.reply.compact_cycle: Compression cycle (storage packing, not a real obtain path): swaps with %s
packai.reply.web_header_mixed: [Web｜Minecraft mods only; other pack areas may be modified; no local override for this topic — reference only]
packai.reply.web_header_strict: [Web｜Minecraft mod related only; pack changes may differ]
packai.reply.web_header_local: [Web｜supplement] Local script/loot/quest data exists: local always wins on conflict; use web only for gaps.
packai.reply.jei_no_recipes: [JEI] No JEI recipe data for the held item.
packai.reply.jei_hint_empty: [JEI tip] No held item: type mod:id in the question, or hover an item in JEI then ask.
packai.reply.jei_empty: [JEI] %s has no showable recipes, uses, or machine recipes.
packai.reply.spam_skip_label: cosmetic/facade/framed covers (apply to almost every block)
packai.reply.craft_pref_base: Among obtain/craft routes prefer simpler stations over complex machines; when tied prefer faster/higher yield.
packai.reply.craft_pref.quest: Player prefers showing [quest] obtain paths first (rewards / quest book), then craft and others.
packai.reply.craft_pref.loot: Player prefers showing [loot/fish/trade] obtain paths first, then craft and quests.
packai.reply.craft_pref.balanced: Present obtain paths (craft, quest, loot, …) evenly; interleave naturally.
packai.reply.craft_pref.craft: Player prefers showing [craft/JEI] recipe paths first; mention quest rewards last unless asked about quests.
packai.reply.season_serene: [Season] Serene Seasons estimate: %s (day %s; check in-game season calendar)
packai.reply.season_fd: [Season] Some Farmer's Delight crops are seasonal; use the season above for plantability.
packai.reply.psi_addon: [Psi] Player wants a Psi spell: explain trick composition (vectors, entities, motion, sensors) in the same language as the answer; list suggested trick names/order; remind to assemble in CAD and test PSI cost. Do not invent nonexistent tricks; if unsure, suggest JEI Psi categories.
packai.reply.sources_instruction: End every answer with a new line starting with [Sources], listing what you used (at least one), e.g. JEI, pack quest book, pack local recipes, web search (mod docs), AI inference. Do not omit [Sources]. Write the [Sources] header and labels in the same language as the answer body.
packai.reply.llm_style: Write plain steps (how / materials / steps) for in-game Minecraft text. Never use emoji, Markdown (# ** ` - headers), item IDs, file paths, KubeJS/scripts, or JSON. Use readable item names only. %s If jei is present: prefer it for recipes/uses (like JEI R/U) and catalyst/machine recipes; JEI list is already preference-sorted. If local acquire/loot/fish/trade/script facts exist, include obtain paths JEI may miss; note conflicts with JEI. Compression 9↔1 packing is storage only — never treat as main obtain/progression unless asked. For quests use quest/chapter names only — never hex quest IDs. When recommending items, end with machine marker only: <!--packai:items=mod:id|Display Name,mod:id2|Other Name-->. Display names must match in-game item names. If several items share one registry id and differ by display name/NBT, the marker MUST include |Display Name. List same-name items from different mods. If [Web] is present: only Minecraft/mod content; local JEI/quests/scripts win on conflict. %s
packai.reply.llm_rules.override: Player says the quest book is wrong: answer from local facts and mark that the quest may be wrong.
packai.reply.llm_rules.conflict: Quest may be outdated: prefer pack modifications.
packai.reply.llm_rules.local_only: This topic has local overrides: prefer local/JEI/quests; web is OK as a supplement for gaps — ignore web on conflict.
packai.reply.llm_rules.mixed: The pack may only modify some content; no local override for this item — web mod docs ok, but JEI/local win.
packai.reply.llm_rules.default: You may use common sense and web mod info, but local data wins on conflict.
packai.reply.llm_system_lead: You are a Minecraft modpack assistant. Answer in %s (game language: %s). Regardless of the language of the question or chat history, write the answer body and [Sources] in %s. Continue prior conversation context when present.
packai.reply.fact_check: First identify the item from question / heldItem.id / JEI header (registry id + name). If the item identity is clear, never say you cannot tell what the item is. Do not invent pack-unique recipes or quests. If JEI data is present, list ingredients and outputs using JEI labels verbatim — including any parenthesized NBT/component/enchantment/numeric requirements; same registry id with different NBT is a different item. Do not merge recipes or invent shapeless/shaped or machines not listed in JEI. If JEI/local has no pack override for that item, you may use standard vanilla/mod knowledge for uses and common obtain methods, labeled as general knowledge (not a pack override). Only say uncertain when the item identity itself cannot be resolved from the request. Use quest names only, never quest IDs. Blank beats fabricating pack-unique content, but do not pretend a known item is unknown.
packai.reply.llm_api_key_hint: Tip: if curl works, set llm.apiKey in config/packai-client.toml (full sk-…), or PACKAI_API_KEY; the in-game field may be wrong. Current key length=%s
